name: Cran-Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine first 7 ingredients in a heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Stir in cranberries.
5. Pour into pastry shell.
6. Sprinkle with pecans.
7. Bake at 400°F for 35 to 40 minutes or until set, covering edges with aluminum foil after 20 minutes.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
